title: Zanzibari Crumble
description: A sweet dessert featuring the exotic flavor of zanzibari and a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together zanzibari, crumbly, and nut.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together crumble and a pinch of sugar.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the top of the zanzibari mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
